query:
CREATE TABLE `submitter_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`useCaseId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('approved','rejected') NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`isRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `submitter_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3U88QiHqLLRvau3.3ccbfad70b32 --database jnjQ5dYouig6ULcXneQuMs --execute CREATE TABLE `submitter_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`useCaseId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('approved','rejected') NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`isRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `submitter_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
